summary: All 6 requested features tested and verified working correctly. Backend APIs and Frontend UI are functioning as expected.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from iteration_93
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Cash register close works with branch_id, External Branches shows correct materials value (274,000) and total due (371,050), Settings user edit dialog has owner_wallet and external_branches permissions.

1_cash_register_close_for_branch.description: إغلاق الصندوق - التأكد من عدم ظهور خطأ 'لا يوجد وردية مفتوحة' للمدراء
verified: Cash register close dialog opens successfully for managers
Shows branch name (Aljadreia) and shift details
Displays total sales, cash, expenses, and expected cash
Cash counting denominations working
Note: Alsaydaia (sold branch) has no open shift - this is expected behavior

2_external_branches_materials_value.description: صفحة الفروع الخارجية - التأكد من أن قيمة المواد المسحوبة = 274,000
verified: API /api/external-branches/dashboard/stats returns monthly_materials: 274000
API /api/external-branches/ returns total_materials_withdrawn: 274000
Frontend displays 'IQD 274,000' in the stats card
Materials value calculated from orders.total_cost

3_external_branches_total_due.description: صفحة الفروع الخارجية - التأكد من أن إجمالي المستحق = 371,050
verified: API /api/external-branches/dashboard/stats returns total_monthly_due: 371050
API /api/external-branches/ returns pending_amount: 371050
Frontend displays 'IQD 371,050' in the stats card
Calculation: revenue (97,050) + materials (274,000) + monthly_fee (0) = 371,050

4_settings_user_permissions.description: صفحة الإعدادات - نافذة تعديل المستخدم يجب أن تحتوي على صلاحيات خزينة المالك والفروع الخارجية
verified: Edit user dialog contains 'التحكم بالميزات الخاصة' section
خزينة المالك (Owner Wallet) toggle switch present
الفروع الخارجية (External Branches) toggle switch present
Both toggles are functional and save correctly

5_cash_register_summary_api.description: API /api/cash-register/summary - يجب أن تعمل مع branch_id parameter
verified: API accepts branch_id as query parameter
Returns 404 'لا يوجد وردية مفتوحة' for branches without open shifts (expected)
Works correctly for branches with open shifts
Managers can access any branch's shift summary
API returns monthly_materials: 274000 (> 0)
API returns monthly_revenue: 97050
API returns total_monthly_due: 371050
API returns sold_branches_count: 1

GET /api/cash-register/summary?branch_id.response: لا يوجد وردية مفتوحة (expected for sold branch without open shift)

screenshots: .screenshots/external_branches_test.png - External Branches page showing correct values
